name: 飞机大战 hit a plane
short_description: This is a simple casual flying game where players control their fighter jets to eliminate enemies, and their scores accumulate points as the enemies are eliminated!
detailed_description:
This is a simple casual flying game where players control their fighter jets to eliminate enemies, and their scores accumulate points as the enemies are eliminated!

There may be additional rewards during the game: Little Bees! As your score gets higher and higher, the speed at which enemies appear will gradually test the player's hand speed and eyesight!

Of course, this game can be paused at any time, you can do anything you want and then come back to continue playing!

Games are a form of entertainment that can bring the greatest joy and excitement, allowing people to forget their troubles and relax.
